tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B - Planned treatments
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B: Maintain: Alignment of bus lanes, Operational hours of bus lanes. Upgrade: 16 Bus Stops, 17 Sidewalk Extensions, 12 Shortened Crossings, 38 Medians/Median Tips. Add: 7 Additional Crossings, 3 Raised Crosswalks, 75+ Street Trees, 10,000+ ft2 Landscaped Area

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B will maintain alignment and operational hours of bus lanes; upgrade 16 Bus Stops, 17 Sidewalk Extensions, 12 Shortened Crossings, 38 Medians/Median Tips; add 7 Additional Crossings, 3 Raised Crosswalks, 75+ Street Trees, 10,000+ ft2 Landscaped Area

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av - Planned treatments
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av: Maintain: Alignment of bus lanes, Operational hours of bus lanes. Upgrade: 5 Bus Stops (2 Bus Bulbs), 23 Sidewalk Extensions, 20 Shortened Crossings, 6 Reconstructed Medians. Add: 7 Additional Crossings, 5 Raised Crosswalks, 20+ Street Trees

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av will maintain alignment and operational hours of bus lanes; upgrade 5 Bus Stops (2 Bus Bulbs), 23 Sidewalk Extensions, 20 Shortened Crossings, 6 Reconstructed Medians; add 7 Additional Crossings, 5 Raised Crosswalks, 20+ Street Trees

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C - Planned treatments
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C: Maintain: Alignment of bus lanes, Operational hours of bus lanes, Complement improvements made by Woodhaven Blvd Phase B and Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av. Upgrade: Bus Stops, Sidewalk Extensions, Shortened Crossings, Reconstructed Medians. Add: Crossings, Raised Crosswalks, Street Trees & Landscaping, Improved Lighting

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C will maintain alignment and operational hours of bus lanes, complement improvements made by Woodhaven Blvd Phase B and Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av; upgrade Bus Stops, Sidewalk Extensions, Shortened Crossings, Reconstructed Medians; add Crossings, Raised Crosswalks, Street Trees & Landscaping, Improved Lighting
